response.justification: Bogdan brings solid Staff-level engineering breadth, active MCP server and agentic-workflow infrastructure work at re:cinq, and strong TypeScript/Node.js delivery experience across cloud-adjacent roles. However, the gaps against this JD's core requirements are significant: Python is entirely absent from his skill set despite being a primary required language; there is no mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, or multi-agent frameworks; and his AI-specific experience is confined to his current role (April 2025–present), representing roughly 13 months against an 8-year minimum. The customer-facing technical leadership component central to a Forward Deployed Engineer role is also weakly evidenced.
strengths: Hands-on MCP (Model Context Protocol) framework and agentic-workflow infrastructure work at re:cinq directly matches a key technology listed in the JD
Sustained Staff-level engineering career with demonstrated cloud exposure (AWS CDK at Optilyz) and high-throughput data integration experience (Dunnhumby, millions of requests/second)
Active knowledge-sharing through conference talks, multi-day workshops, and open-source projects indicates the mentoring and engineering-excellence traits the role requires
concerns: Python is entirely absent from the resume's skills section despite being a primary language for AI solution development specified in the JD
No mention of RAG architectures, vector databases, LLM evaluation/optimization, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, etc.)—all core technical requirements of the role
AI-specific experience is limited to approximately 13 months in the current role, far short of the 8-year minimum; prior roles show no AI/ML work

key_factors.factor: No Python + missing AI stack (RAG, vector DBs, multi-agent)
MCP and agentic workflow infrastructure work
